svg.text: Software Practice, Not a Static Resume
I mainly study software engineering while staying curious about adjacent computer-science fields.
The profile is organized as a working record: projects, notes, environments, and visual context
are kept together so the direction remains readable after the first round of learning.
Base: Big Data Management and Application
Main line: agents, full-stack systems, Linux, security, learning systems
